mapper.sql: pee.employee_id as pe_id, pee.emergency_contact, pee.emergency_tele, pee.remarks, pee.attribute1, pee.attribute2, pee.attribute3, pee.enabled_flag, pee.id, pee.create_time, pee.create_by, pee.update_time, pee.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.emergency_contact as ${tAlias}_emergency_contact, ${tAlias}.emergency_tele as ${tAlias}_emergency_tele, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_emergency (employee_id, emergency_contact, emergency_tele, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{emergencyContact,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_emergency set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, emergency_tele = #{emergencyTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select peem.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peem.emergency_contact) > 0 then peem.emergency_contact else null end as emergency_contact, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peem.emergency_tele) > 0 then peem.emergency_tele else null end as emergency_tele, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peem.remarks) > 0 then peem.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee_emergency peem join pm_employee pe on pe.id = peem.employee_id where peem.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( peem.emergency_contact,peem.emergency_tele,peem.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_emergency (employee_id, emergency_contact, emergency_tele, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{emergencyContact,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR},1, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
